evidence_hint: src/schema.ts:166-290 defines the MetaV3 nine-plane model (META_V3_SCHEMA_VERSION, META_V3_PLANES, IdentityPlane…LineagePlane, MetaV3). grep shows MetaV3/META_V3_* only in tests/schema.test.ts. No function converts NormalizedMeta→MetaV3.
residual_if_not_resolved: Add a NormalizedMeta→MetaV3 builder wired into inject/index emission (≥1 live producer+consumer), or drop the v3 types until a consumer exists.
